---
title: "SVM"
format: html
editor: visual
---

```{r}

# Step One: Load Libraries

library(tidyverse)
library(tidymodels)
library(kernlab)
library(plotly)
library(vip)
library(janitor)

tidymodels_prefer()



```
```{r}

# Step Two: Load Data

data <- read_csv("../data/final_data_weather_training.csv") %>%
  clean_names()

data

```
```{r}

# Step Three: Reduce dataset for SVM testing

set.seed(001)

data_model <- data %>%
  filter(!is.na(yield_mg_ha)) %>%
  select(-any_of(c(
    "replicate",
    "block",
    "grain_moisture",
    "planted_doy",
    "harvested_doy"
  )))

data_model_small <- data_model %>%
  slice_sample(n = 10000)

```

```{r}

# Step Four: Train/Test Split

set.seed(001)

data_split <- initial_split(
  data_model_small,
  prop = 0.8,
  strata = yield_mg_ha
)

train_data <- training(data_split)
test_data <- testing(data_split)

```

```{r}

# Step Five: Recipe

svm_recipe <- recipe(yield_mg_ha ~ ., data = train_data) %>%
  step_impute_median(all_numeric_predictors()) %>%
  step_novel(all_nominal_predictors()) %>%
  step_unknown(all_nominal_predictors()) %>%
  step_other(all_nominal_predictors(), threshold = 0.001) %>%
  step_dummy(all_nominal_predictors()) %>%
  step_zv(all_predictors()) %>%
  step_normalize(all_numeric_predictors())

```

```{r}

# Step Six: Specify SVM Model

svm_spec <- svm_rbf(
  cost = tune(),
  rbf_sigma = tune()
) %>%
  set_engine("kernlab") %>%
  set_mode("regression")

```

```{r}

# Step Seven: Workflow

svm_workflow <- workflow() %>%
  add_recipe(svm_recipe) %>%
  add_model(svm_spec)

```

```{r}

# Step Eight: Cross Validation

set.seed(001)

svm_folds <- vfold_cv(
  train_data,
  v = 5,
  strata = yield_mg_ha
)

```

```{r}

# Step Nine: Tune SVM

svm_grid <- grid_regular(
  cost(range = c(-2, 4)),
  rbf_sigma(range = c(-5, 0)),
  levels = 4
)

set.seed(001)

svm_tune <- tune_grid(
  svm_workflow,
  resamples = svm_folds,
  grid = svm_grid,
  metrics = metric_set(rmse, rsq)
)

```

```{r}

# Step Ten: Select Best Model

best_svm <- select_best(
  svm_tune,
  metric = "rmse"
)

best_svm

```

```{r}

# Step Eleven: Finalize Workflow

final_svm_workflow <- finalize_workflow(
  svm_workflow,
  best_svm
)

```

```{r}

# Step Twelve: Fit Final Model

final_svm_fit <- final_svm_workflow %>%
  fit(data = train_data)

```

```{r}

# Step Thirteen: Predict on Internal Testing Set

svm_pred <- predict(final_svm_fit, test_data) %>%
  bind_cols(test_data %>% select(yield_mg_ha))

```

```{r}

# Step Fourteen: Model Metrics

svm_metrics <- svm_pred %>%
  metrics(
    truth = yield_mg_ha,
    estimate = .pred
  )

svm_metrics

```

```{r}

# Step Fifteen: Predicted vs Observed Plot

rmse_val <- svm_pred %>%
  rmse(truth = yield_mg_ha, estimate = .pred) %>%
  pull(.estimate)

r2_val <- svm_pred %>%
  rsq(truth = yield_mg_ha, estimate = .pred) %>%
  pull(.estimate)

ggplot(svm_pred, aes(x = yield_mg_ha, y = .pred)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.4) +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  annotate(
    "text",
    x = min(svm_pred$yield_mg_ha, na.rm = TRUE),
    y = max(svm_pred$.pred, na.rm = TRUE),
    label = paste0(
      "RMSE = ", round(rmse_val, 3),
      "\nR² = ", round(r2_val, 3)
    ),
    hjust = 0
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Predicted vs Observed Yield - SVM",
    x = "Observed Yield (Mg/ha)",
    y = "Predicted Yield (Mg/ha)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

```

```{r}

# Step Sixteen: Variable Importance

set.seed(001)

# Baseline performance
baseline_pred <- predict(final_svm_fit, test_data) %>%
  bind_cols(test_data %>% select(yield_mg_ha))

baseline_rmse <- rmse(
  baseline_pred,
  truth = yield_mg_ha,
  estimate = .pred
) %>%
  pull(.estimate)

# Predictor names
predictor_names <- test_data %>%
  select(-yield_mg_ha) %>%
  names()

# Permutation importance
perm_importance <- map_dfr(
  predictor_names,
  function(var) {
    
    permuted_data <- test_data
    
    permuted_data[[var]] <- sample(permuted_data[[var]])
    
    perm_pred <- predict(final_svm_fit, permuted_data) %>%
      bind_cols(permuted_data %>% select(yield_mg_ha))
    
    perm_rmse <- rmse(
      perm_pred,
      truth = yield_mg_ha,
      estimate = .pred
    ) %>%
      pull(.estimate)
    
    tibble(
      variable = var,
      rmse_permuted = perm_rmse,
      importance = perm_rmse - baseline_rmse
    )
  }
)

perm_importance

perm_importance %>%
  arrange(desc(importance)) %>%
  slice_head(n = 15) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = reorder(variable, importance), y = importance)) +
  geom_col() +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(
    title = "Variable Importance - SVM",
    x = "Variable",
    y = "Increase in RMSE after permutation"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

```

```{r}

# Step Seventeen: Predicting on Ufficial Test

testing_data_weather <- read_csv("../data/final_data_weather_testing.csv")

final_prediction <- predict(
  final_svm_fit,
  testing_data_weather
)

submission_svm <- testing_data_weather %>%
  bind_cols(final_prediction) %>%
  mutate(yield_mg_ha = .pred) %>%
  select(year, site, hybrid, yield_mg_ha)

write_csv(submission_svm, "../data/submission_svm.csv")

final_prediction %>%
  summarise(
    min = min(.pred),
    max = max(.pred),
    mean = mean(.pred),
    n_unique = n_distinct(.pred)
  )

```
